title: Google TPU 8t and 8i is here..
summary: Google released TPU 8t and TPU 8i, ASIC-based accelerators for training and inference respectively. The TPUs are served via Virgo Network to enable high throughput, and the video compares their scaling economics against NVIDIA GPUs in serving LLMs at scale.
